title: Narrow WGX to shared fleet checks
goal: Inventory WGX guards, smoke tests, metrics and templates against repository-native CI and Grabowski, then retain only cross-repository functions with demonstrated shared consumers.

acceptance.assertion: Each WGX capability names repositories that consume it and the repository-native alternative.
WGX does not own task coordination, deploy authority or generic host mutation already owned by Bureau or Grabowski.
Retained checks have multiple real consumers or a documented fleet-wide invariance benefit.
Retired or migrated checks preserve CI coverage and provide source-linked replacement paths.
